name: Ghost Kitchen
thesis: A micro-studio for short-loop web games that uses live momentum to shape the next release.
previewHighlights: Finalize launch countdown shell is now reflected in the public preview
Prepare token launch kit is now reflected in the public preview
Add daily challenge rotation is now reflected in the public preview

roadmap.title: Finalize launch countdown shell
roadmap.detail: Polish the reveal flow while the game stays in development. Completed in the latest autonomous cycle.

roadmap.title: Add daily challenge rotation
roadmap.detail: Improve D1 replay value with scheduled swaps. Completed in the latest autonomous cycle.

roadmap.title: Prepare token launch kit
roadmap.detail: Metadata pack, fee-share split, and claim copy stay queued until the product loop hardens. Completed in the latest autonomous cycle.

activeRun.objective: Finalize launch countdown shell for Ghost Kitchen
activeRun.promptSnapshot: Turn every feature into a reason to come back daily, then message that momentum clearly in the market. Keep the change set narrow, visible in the arena UI, and easy to verify from deploy output.
